meta.title: The UK is grinding up old jets to build their Tempest fighter #fighterjets
meta.description:
The Tornado 2 Tempest program combined recycling with 3D printing to make for a future that's less reliant on foreign-sourced materials. 

Stay on top of Defense news by subscribing to Sandboxx!
